variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHHP40056 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169801SH10XLF000V
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHHP40056 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169801SH10XLF000V
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHHP40056 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Eppensteiner 169801SH10XLF000V. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHHP40056
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 51.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 23.8 mm, Length: 207.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 210 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 210 BAR, Seal: Viton

variants.title: Donaldson P167415 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169801SH10XLF000V
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P167415 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169801SH10XLF000V
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P167415 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.

variants.option1Value: Filtrec D121G10BV Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169801SH10XLF000V
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec D121G10BV. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the D121G10BV provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
